name: Welt
desc: A seasoned member of the Express Crew.\nThe passion buried in his heart burns anew as he enjoys this fresh adventure.\nOccasionally, he would sketch the experiences in a notebook.

1.name: Legacy of Honor
1.desc: After using Ultimate, Welt gets enhanced. Then, the next <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> time(s) he uses Basic ATK or Skill, deals 1 extra instance of <u>Additional DMG</u> to the enemy target. The <u>Additional DMG</u> dealt when using Basic ATK is equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Basic ATK DMG multiplier. The <u>Additional DMG</u> dealt when using Skill is equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Skill DMG multiplier.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

2.name: Conflux of Stars
2.desc: When his Talent is triggered, Welt regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

3.name: Prayer of Peace
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Appellation of Justice
4.desc: When using Skill, increases the <u>base chance</u> of reducing the attacked enemy target's SPD by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

5.name: Power of Kindness
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Prospect of Glory
6.desc: When using Skill, deals DMG for 1 extra time to one random enemy.

100401.name: Gravity Suppression
100401.desc: Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Welt's ATK to one designated enemy.
100401.simple_desc: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to one enemy.

100402.name: Edge of the Void
100402.desc: Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Welt's ATK to one designated enemy and additionally deals 2 instances of DMG, with each time dealing Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Welt's ATK to a random enemy. On hit, there is a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> <u>base chance</u> to reduce the enemy's SPD by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
100402.simple_desc: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to one enemy. This attack can Bounce 3 times, with a chance of <color=#f29e38ff>Slowing</color> the hit enemies.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

100403.name: Synthetic <unbreak>Black Hole</unbreak>
100403.desc: Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Welt's ATK to all enemies, with a <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> for enemies hit by this ability to be Imprisoned for 1 turn.\nImprisoned enemies have their <u>actions delayed</u> by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> and SPD reduced by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>.
100403.simple_desc: Deals Imaginary DMG to all enemies, with <color=#f29e38ff>a high chance of Imprisoning them</color>.

10000002.name: Delay Action
10000002.desc: Increases the target's waiting interval before the next action.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

100404.name: Time Distortion
100404.desc: When hitting an enemy that is already Slowed, Welt deals Imaginary <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of his ATK to the enemy.
100404.simple_desc: When hitting a Slowed enemy, <color=#f29e38ff>additionally deals minor Imaginary <u>Additional DMG</u></color>.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

100406.name: Attack
100406.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

100407.name: Gravitational Imprisonment
100407.desc: After using Welt's Technique, create a Special Dimension that lasts for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> second(s). Enemies in this Special Dimension have their movement speed reduced by <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak>. After entering battle with enemies in the Special Dimension, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to Imprison the enemies for 1 turn.\nImprisoned enemies have their <u>actions delayed</u> by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> and SPD reduced by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>. Only 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.
100407.simple_desc: Creates a Special Dimension. Enemies in this dimension have their movement speed reduced. After entering combat with enemies in the dimension, there is a <color=#f29e38ff>high chance for the enemies to become Imprisoned</color>.

10000002.name: Delay Action
10000002.desc: Increases the target's waiting interval before the next action.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1.point_desc: When using Ultimate, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to increase the DMG taken by the targets by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1.point_desc: Deals <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> more DMG to enemies inflicted with Weakness Break.

descs: Inflicts the <color=#f29e38ff>"Weightless" state</color> on the target. Targets in the "Weightless" state have their <color=#f29e38ff>action delayed when attacked</color>
Targets in the "Weightless" state have <color=#f29e38ff>reduced DEF</color>
Welt's <color=#f29e38ff>Effect Hit Rate can increase ATK at a certain ratio</color>

1.name: Legacy of Honor
1.desc: After using a Skill or Ultimate to hit a target in the "Weightless" state, additionally deals 1 instance of Imaginary <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the Ultimate's DMG multiplier. This effect can only be triggered once per target per attack.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

2.name: Conflux of Stars
2.desc: When his Talent is triggered, Welt regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

3.name: Prayer of Peace
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Appellation of Justice
4.desc: Enemy targets in the "Weightless" state have their All-Type RES reduced by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

5.name: Power of Kindness
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Prospect of Glory
6.desc: When using Skill or Ultimate to hit an enemy target in the Slow state, increases CRIT Rate by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> and CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> for the DMG dealt.

1100401.name: Gravity Suppression
1100401.desc: Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Welt's ATK to one designated enemy.
1100401.simple_desc: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to one enemy.

1100402.name: Edge of the Void
1100402.desc: Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Welt's ATK to one designated enemy and additionally deals DMG 4 times, with each time dealing Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Welt's ATK to one random enemy. On hit, there is a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> <u>base chance</u> to reduce the enemy's SPD by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
1100402.simple_desc: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to one enemy. This attack can Bounce 5 times, with a chance of <color=#f29e38ff>Slowing</color> the hit enemies.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1100403.name: Synthetic Black Hole
1100403.desc: Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Welt's ATK to all enemies. Has a <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to Imprison hit enemy targets for 1 turn.\nWhile Imprisoned, enemy targets have their <u>actions delayed</u> by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> and their SPD reduced by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>. After using his Ultimate, inflicts the "Weightless" state on all enemies. When targets in "Weightless" state get attacked, their <u>actions are delayed</u> by <unbreak>#5[f1]%</unbreak>. This effect can trigger up to <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> time(s) per target per turn. "Weightless" lasts for <unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
1100403.simple_desc: Deals Imaginary DMG to all enemies with a <color=#f29e38ff>high chance to inflict Imprisonment</color>. Inflicts all enemies with "Weightless": when attacked, their <u>actions are delayed</u>.

10000002.name: Delay Action
10000002.desc: Increases the target's waiting interval before the next action.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1100404.name: Time Distortion
1100404.desc: Enemy targets in the "Weightless" state have their DEF reduced by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> and their SPD reduced by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>. When Welt attacks an enemy that is already Slowed, he additionally deals Imaginary <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of his ATK to the enemy.
1100404.simple_desc: Enemy targets in the "Weightless" state have reduced DEF and SPD. When hitting a Slowed enemy target, <color=#f29e38ff>additionally deals minor Imaginary <u>Additional DMG</u></color>.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

1100406.name: Attack
1100406.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

1100407.name: Gravitational Imprisonment
1100407.desc: After using Welt's Technique, create a Special Dimension that lasts for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> second(s). Enemies in this Special Dimension have their movement speed reduced by <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak>. After entering combat with enemies in the Special Dimension, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to Imprison the enemies for 1 turn.\nImprisoned enemies have their <u>actions delayed</u> by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> and SPD reduced by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>. Only 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.
1100407.simple_desc: Creates a Special Dimension. Enemies in this dimension have their movement speed reduced. After entering combat with enemies in the dimension, there is a <color=#f29e38ff>high chance for the enemies to become Imprisoned</color>.

10000002.name: Delay Action
10000002.desc: Increases the target's waiting interval before the next action.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1.point_desc: When ally targets attack targets under the "Weightless" state, their DMG dealt increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. This effect stacks up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> times and lasts for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s). At the start of the battle, Welt regenerates <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> Energy.

When Welt uses Basic ATK or Skill, additionally deals 1 extra instance of <u>Additional DMG</u> to the enemy target. The <u>Additional DMG</u> dealt when using Basic ATK is equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Basic ATK DMG multiplier. The <u>Additional DMG</u> dealt when using Skill is equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Skill DMG multiplier.

10000005.name: Additional DMG
10000005.desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

1.point_desc: When Welt's <u>Effect Hit Rate</u> is greater than <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, for every <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> that exceeds this value, increases ATK by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>, up to a maximum increase of <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>. When using Ultimate, additionally restores <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> Energy.

30000004.name: Effect Hit Rate
30000004.desc: Effect Hit Rate increases the chance of applying debuffs to enemy targets. \nA higher Effect Hit Rate will result in higher chances of successfully applying a debuff.
